name: home-assistant-blade-mcp
title: Home Assistant
description: Home Assistant operations — entities, state, history, device control, automations, energy, multi-site management
author: groupthink-dev

env.name: HA_PROVIDERS
env.description: Comma-separated provider names for multi-instance mode (e.g. sandybay,paddington)

setup.blurb: Connect to Home Assistant for smart home control, monitoring, and automation management. Supports multi-site.
setup.help_text: Create a Long-Lived Access Token at Profile → Security → Long-Lived Access Tokens in your Home Assistant instance. For multi-site, set HA_PROVIDERS and per-provider URL/token env vars.

fields.label: Home Assistant URL
fields.help: The base URL of your Home Assistant instance

fields.label: Enable Write Operations
fields.help: Set to 'true' to enable device control, scene activation, and automation triggers
